packet_markdown:
# 1600 Vine building packet

## Snapshot
- Building ID: 1600-vine-1600-vine-st
- Address: 1600 Vine St
- Primary URL: https://www.1600vine.com/amenities
- Management company: Sentral
- Recommended status: rejected
- Last updated: 2026-03-22

## Scorecard
- Quiet: 2 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Management: 1 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Amenity: 5 (high, evidence count 2)
- Community stability: 2 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Location fit: 4
- Pricing transparency: 3

## Risks
- Structural noise risk: unknown
- Location noise risk: high
- Security risk: medium
- Pricing risk: medium

## Evidence summary
- [official] Official marketing still shows extensive shared amenities, including reservable workspaces, rooftop terraces, and a 24-hour fitness center. Source: 1600 VINE amenities (https://www.1600vine.com/amenities). Note: Amenities page highlights reservable workspaces, rooftop terraces, and a 24-hour fitness center with fiber Wi-Fi.
- [news] Sentral publicly announced that 1600 Vine joined its Los Angeles portfolio in July 2025. Source: Yahoo Finance / Sentral press release (https://finance.yahoo.com/news/sentral-expands-portfolio-los-angeles-115000377.html). Note: The July 10, 2025 press release says Sentral added 1600 Vine to its portfolio.
- [news] Recent local coverage still describes 1600 Vine as a building built around content-creation spaces and influencer activity. Source: NBC Los Angeles (https://www.nbclosangeles.com/news/local/tiktok-ban-la-content-creators-1600-vine-hollywood/3394832/). Note: NBC describes creator-oriented “wedges” and the building as a place for influencers in Hollywood.
- [public_record] A public complaints index accessible on the web showed no closed complaints in the last three years, which partially conflicts with the repo’s legacy collapse note. Source: BCA complaint index (https://report.checkbca.org/1600-vine-at-hollywood-and-vine-100109774/complaints). Note: The BCA page reported 0 complaints closed in the last 3 years.

## Open questions
- None beyond normal unit-level verification.

## Notes
Hard stop kept. Official amenity evidence remains strong, but repo history plus the Hollywood/Vine operating profile still make this a reject. Current public signals conflict in places, so management confidence is medium rather than high.
